name: ai-sailing
description: Weather-routing app voor zeilers: optimale route A naar B met wind, getijstroming en vaarbeperkingen

scripts.typecheck: node --check server/index.js && node --check server/routing/geo.js && node --check server/routing/polar.js && node --check server/routing/weather.js && node --check server/routing/isochrone.js && node --check public/app.js
